"use strict"; let mappingsWasm = null; module.exports = function readWasm() { if (typeof mappingsWasm === "string") { return fetch(mappingsWasm).then(response => response.arrayBuffer()); } if (mappingsWasm instanceof ArrayBuffer) { return Promise.resolve(mappingsWasm); } throw new Error( "You must provide the string URL or ArrayBuffer contents " + "of lib/mappings.wasm by calling " + "SourceMapConsumer.initialize({ 'lib/mappings.wasm': ... }) " + "before using SourceMapConsumer" ); }; module.exports.initialize = input => { mappingsWasm = input; };
